summary: AgriSmart Terminal MVP (Iteration 110) - All features tested and working. Comprehensive testing of YouTube TV-style pairing flow, terminal shell with Sales/PO Check/Transfers tabs, Settings page Connect Terminal tab, and no regression on existing POS routes.

backend_api_tests.generate_code: PASS - POST /api/terminal/generate-code returns 6-char alphanumeric code with 300s expiry
backend_api_tests.generate_code_no_auth: PASS - No authentication required for code generation
backend_api_tests.poll_pending: PASS - GET /api/terminal/poll/{code} returns 'pending' for fresh code
backend_api_tests.poll_lowercase_normalized: PASS - Lowercase input normalized to uppercase
backend_api_tests.pair_success: PASS - POST /api/terminal/pair creates terminal session and returns terminal_id
backend_api_tests.pair_invalid_code_length: PASS - Rejects codes that aren't 6 characters
backend_api_tests.list_active: PASS - GET /api/terminal/active lists active terminal sessions (excludes token)
backend_api_tests.full_pairing_flow: PASS - Complete workflow: generate -> poll (pending) -> pair -> poll (paired with token) -> use token for API

frontend_ui_tests.terminal_pairing_screen: PASS - /terminal shows 6-char code with countdown timer on mobile viewport
frontend_ui_tests.terminal_instructions: PASS - 3-step instructions displayed (Open Settings, Connect Terminal, Enter code)
frontend_ui_tests.terminal_shell_transition: PASS - Terminal transitions to shell after pairing detected via polling
frontend_ui_tests.terminal_shell_header: PASS - Shows AgriSmart | Branch name | Online status | Sync & Logout buttons
frontend_ui_tests.terminal_sales_tab: PASS - Sales view with search input and camera scanner button
frontend_ui_tests.terminal_po_check_tab: PASS - PO Check view with search, refresh button, empty state
frontend_ui_tests.terminal_transfers_tab: PASS - Transfers view with search, refresh button, empty state
frontend_ui_tests.terminal_bottom_nav: PASS - Bottom navigation with Sales/PO Check/Transfers tabs
frontend_ui_tests.settings_connect_terminal_tab: PASS - Visible for admin users in Settings page
frontend_ui_tests.settings_terminal_url: PASS - Shows correct terminal URL with copy button
frontend_ui_tests.settings_code_input: PASS - Code input field with ABC123 placeholder
frontend_ui_tests.settings_active_terminals: PASS - List of active terminals with Disconnect buttons
frontend_ui_tests.main_pos_sales: PASS - Sales page loads with product grid and cart

verified_features: Terminal Pairing Screen at /terminal shows 6-character code with countdown
Code generation API returns alphanumeric uppercase codes with 5-minute expiry
Poll API returns pending/paired/expired/invalid status correctly
Pairing API creates terminal session with auth token for terminal use
Terminal transitions to shell view automatically after pairing detected
Terminal shell shows Sales tab by default with product search and cart
Terminal shell PO Check tab loads with search and refresh functionality
Terminal shell Transfers tab loads with search and refresh functionality
Terminal shell has online/offline status indicator
Terminal logout returns to pairing screen and clears localStorage
Settings page Connect Terminal tab visible only for admin users
Settings terminal pairing UI has code input, branch select, and Pair button
Active terminals list shows paired terminals with disconnect capability
No regression on existing POS routes (login, dashboard, sales pages)
critical_code_review_comments: Terminal route /terminal correctly placed OUTSIDE AuthProvider - manages own auth via pairing flow
Pairing flow uses localStorage 'agrismart_terminal' for session persistence across page reloads
Terminal polling interval is 2 seconds - appropriate for real-time pairing detection
Settings Connect Terminal tab properly gated to admin users via isAdmin check
Active terminals list correctly excludes token field for security
Terminal shell implements offline support with IndexedDB caching via offlineDB.js
seed_data_creation: Created multiple terminal sessions during testing - used existing branches
context_for_next_testing_agent: AgriSmart Terminal MVP fully tested. Key selectors: terminal-pair-screen, pairing-code, terminal-shell, terminal-sales, terminal-po-check, terminal-transfers, tab-sales, tab-po, tab-transfers, terminal-search-input, camera-scanner-btn, sync-btn, terminal-logout-btn, terminal-tab (Settings), terminal-code-input, terminal-branch-select, pair-terminal-btn, terminal-url, copy-terminal-url. Terminal session stored in localStorage as 'agrismart_terminal'. Pairing flow: generate code (POST /api/terminal/generate-code) -> poll (GET /api/terminal/poll/{code}) -> pair on PC (POST /api/terminal/pair with auth) -> terminal detects pairing and transitions to shell.
